channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ADMANUM] Ad-Manum Finance Dispatches KYC Letters to Physical Shareholders
item.description:
Ad-Manum Finance Ltd, through its Registrar & Share Transfer Agent, M/s Ankit Consultancy Pvt. Ltd., is dispatching letters to holders of physical securities. These letters mandate the furnishing of PAN, KYC details, contact information (postal address with PIN and mobile number), bank account details, and nomination, in compliance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/38/13/(4)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/4298/2026 dated February 6, 2026. Shareholders whose folios lack these updated details will be restricted from lodging grievances, availing service requests, and receiving payments (including dividend, interest, or redemption) electronically from April 1, 2024, until compliance.

  • Company is dispatching letters for mandatory KYC updates to physical shareholders.
  • Shareholders must provide PAN, contact, bank details, and nomination.
  • Non-compliant folios will face restrictions on services and electronic payments.
  • The initiative is in accordance with a SEBI Circular dated February 6, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AD-MANUM FINANCE LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [MNKALCOLTD] Manaksia Aluminium Board to meet May 7 for FY26 results & final dividend
item.description:
Manaksia Aluminium Company Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for May 7, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider the declaration of a Final Dividend on the equity shares for the Financial Year 2025-26, if recommended. The trading window for the company's equity shares, which closed on April 1, 2026, will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of these financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.
  • To consider Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • To consider declaration of Final Dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Manaksia Aluminium Company Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IFCI] IFCI reports FY26 standalone net loss of ₹51.71 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IFCI Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. For the full financial year 2026, the company reported a standalone net loss of ₹51.71 crore. The total standalone revenue from operations for FY26 was ₹897.71 crore, with a profit before tax of ₹45.54 crore. For the fourth quarter of FY26, the standalone net loss was ₹21.36 crore. The auditors have issued an unmodified opinion on both the standalone and consolidated financial reports for the period.

  • IFCI Board approved Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Company reported standalone net loss of ₹51.71 crore for FY26.
  • FY26 standalone total revenue from operations was ₹897.71 crore.
  • Q4 FY26 standalone net loss stood at ₹21.36 crore.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on financial reports.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IFCI LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SELAN] Antelopus Selan Energy Board to Meet May 4 for FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Antelopus Selan Energy Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Monday, May 04, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and adopt the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 29(1)(a) of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. Additionally, the trading window for the company's securities, which was previously closed, will remain shut until May 06, 2026. This notice provides investors with the schedule for the upcoming financial results announcement.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 04, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 Audited Financial Results.
  • Trading window remains closed until May 06, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SELAN EXPLORATION TECHNOLOGY LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAJESH] Rajesh Power Services: No Deviation in IPO Fund Utilization for FY26
item.description:
Rajesh Power Services Ltd filed a statement confirming no deviation or variation in the utilization of funds raised through its Initial Public Offering (IPO) as of March 31, 2026. The IPO, which took place on November 28, 2024, raised ₹160.47 Crore. The statement, reviewed by the Audit Committee and taken on record by the Board, indicated that while actual IPO expenses were lower than estimated, the resulting surplus of ₹856.88 lakhs was utilized towards working capital requirements. The company confirmed that funds allocated for capital expenditure, additional working capital, and general corporate purposes were utilized or remained unutilized in line with the original prospectus, with no regulatory deviation reported.

  • Rajesh Power Services reported no deviation in IPO fund utilization for FY26.
  • The IPO raised ₹160.47 crore on November 28, 2024.
  • A surplus of ₹856.88 lakhs from lower IPO expenses was used for working capital.
  • Audit Committee and Board reviewed and approved the fund utilization statement.
  • Funds for capital expenditure remain unutilized as per original plan.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajesh Power Services Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [THELEELA] Leela Palaces approves Q4/FY26 results, invests in BPBKC, appoints PwC
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 28, 2026, to approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The statutory auditor, B S R & Co. LLP, provided an unmodified opinion on these results. Additionally, the Board approved an investment of funds in BPBKC Properties Private Limited and appointed M/s. PricewaterhouseCoopers Services LLP as the Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-27.

  • Board approved Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Statutory Auditor B S R & Co. LLP issued an unmodified opinion on the results.
  • Company approved investment in BPBKC Properties Private Limited.
  • PricewaterhouseCoopers Services LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for FY26-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [IFCI] IFCI Board approves Q4 & FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
IFCI Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 28, 2026, and approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The approval includes the respective Auditors' Report, Statement of Assets & Liabilities, Statement of Cash Flow, and a Declaration of Unmodified Opinion for the financial year. The meeting commenced at 11:00 A.M. and concluded at 01:10 P.M.

  • Board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, were approved.
  • Auditor's Report for FY26 includes an unmodified opinion.
  • The Board Meeting took place on April 28, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IFCI LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ADANIENT] Google Breaks Ground on India AI Hub with AdaniConneX & Nxtra by Airtel
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Google has officially broken ground on its landmark AI hub in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, marking its largest investment in India's digital future. Developed in strategic partnership with AdaniConneX and Nxtra by Airtel, this project aims to establish a gigawatt-scale AI ecosystem to power 'Viksit Bharat'. The ceremony was attended by key dignitaries including Union Minister Shri Ashwini Vaishnaw, Andhra Pradesh CM Shri Nara Chandrababu Naidu, and representatives from Google, Adani Group, and Bharti Enterprises. The hub is envisioned as a cornerstone for India's AI-native future, driving innovation and economic opportunities.

  • Google initiated construction of its largest AI hub in India at Visakhapatnam.
  • AdaniConneX and Nxtra by Airtel are strategic partners in developing this gigawatt-scale AI ecosystem.
  • The project signifies Google's largest investment in India's digital infrastructure.
  • Adani Group's Jeet Adani highlighted the nearly 1 GW scale of the infrastructure.
  • The hub aims to be a catalyst for India's AI-driven growth and economic opportunity.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [THELEELA] Leela Palaces Board Approves FY26 Results, Investment & New Auditor
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd met on April 28, 2026. During the meeting, they approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, which received an unmodified opinion from statutory auditor B S R & Co. LLP. Additionally, the board sanctioned an investment of funds in BPBKC Properties Private Limited and appointed M/s. PricewaterhouseCoopers Services LLP as the internal auditor for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Board approved audited Q4 and FY26 standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Statutory auditor B S R & Co. LLP issued an unmodified opinion on the results.
  • Investment in BPBKC Properties Private Limited was approved by the board.
  • PricewaterhouseCoopers Services LLP appointed as internal auditor for FY2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SRM] SRM Contractors wins "Rashtriya Ratna Samman 2026" as EPC Contractor of the Year
item.description:
SRM Contractors Ltd has been honored with the prestigious "Rashtriya Ratna Samman 2026" in the "EPC Contractor of the Year" category. The award recognizes the company's outstanding contributions to infrastructure development and its excellence in engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) services. Managing Director Mr. Puneet Pal Singh received the accolade at a ceremony in Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi. This recognition highlights SRM's commitment to delivering high-quality infrastructure projects, particularly in challenging terrains, and its consistent demonstration of technical excellence, innovation, and timely project execution. The award reinforces SRM's position as a leading EPC contractor in India and supports its vision for expansion.

  • SRM Contractors received the "Rashtriya Ratna Samman 2026".
  • Recognized as "EPC Contractor of the Year" for infrastructure excellence.
  • Award highlights commitment to high-quality projects and innovation.
  • Reinforces company's leading position and expansion vision.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SRM Contractors Ltd | Category: Award
